name: Muromachi Chemicals Inc.
summary: Muromachi Chemicals Inc. engages in the planning, production, import, and distribution of active pharmaceutical ingredients and radioisotopes in Japan and internationally. The company also processes and distributes ion-exchange resins and fibers, separation membranes, water treatment systems and other applications, and chemicals; and produces and distributes health foods. In addition, it processes and sells functional adhesives and pastes; secondary materials for plant use; clean rollers and adhesive dust removal mats; clean creams and mats; functional film pouches; screen printers; chemical products and secondary materials; and liquid-and water-draining rolls. The company was formerly known as Tenyosya Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Business Corporation and changed its name to Muromachi Chemicals Inc. in September 1998. Muromachi Chemicals Inc. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Omuta, Japan.
